data.name: settings.section.dataDownload.description
data.value: Sync the current store catalog from the server and refresh the local checkout item index.

data.name: settings.section.dataReset.description
data.value: Force a fresh local catalog rebuild when data looks stale, prices do not refresh, or the product index needs a clean reset.

data.name: settings.section.testSalesDataReset.description
data.value: Debug only. Deletes local test orders, payments, card transactions, sync queue items, installment orders, daily closes, and suspended orders.

data.name: settings.square.description
data.value: Configure the Square location and terminal used when Square is the card provider.

data.name: settings.square.switchHelp
data.value: Save Square to make the next card payment use this Square terminal.

data.name: settings.square.tokenStatus.cached
data.value: Local encrypted token cached. HBPOS refreshes it when Square rejects it.

data.name: settings.square.tokenStatus.missing
data.value: No local token cached. The next Square request will fetch one from HBPOS.

data.name: settings.square.tokenHelp
data.value: Square token is stored encrypted on this device and fetched from HBPOS when missing or rejected.

data.name: settings.payment.activeProvider.square
data.value: Square is active for the next card payment.

data.name: settings.payment.activeProvider.square.detail
data.value: Saving Square enables Square. Linkly settings are not used until ANZ Linkly is enabled.

data.name: settings.payment.activeProvider.linkly
data.value: ANZ Linkly is active for the next card payment.

data.name: settings.payment.activeProvider.linkly.detail
data.value: Saving ANZ Linkly keeps Linkly active with {0}. Linkly Cloud backend payments do not use a Square token.

data.name: settings.square.deviceCodesHelp
data.value: Create a device code, enter it on the Square Terminal, then refresh the status to map the paired terminal back into the device selector.

data.name: settings.square.deviceCodes.unsupported
data.value: Square Device Codes are only supported in Production. Sandbox mode keeps device switching available but disables pairing maintenance.

data.name: settings.linkly.description
data.value: Configure ANZ Linkly as the card provider, then choose Local IP, Cloud direct sync, or Cloud backend async.

data.name: settings.linkly.mode.localIp.help
data.value: Use the Windows Linkly EFT-Client on this PC or the local network through the IP gateway.

data.name: settings.linkly.mode.cloudDirectSync.help
data.value: Pair directly to Linkly Cloud. This mode only returns transaction status results.

data.name: settings.linkly.mode.cloudBackendAsync.help
data.value: Use the backend async workflow with display, receipt, sendkey, and signature authorization support. Saving this mode makes the next payment use Linkly Cloud backend, not a Square token.

data.name: settings.linkly.localIp.description
data.value: Connect this POS to the Windows Linkly EFT-Client on the same PC or LAN by IP address and port.

data.name: settings.linkly.cloudDirect.description
data.value: Save the Cloud API test account on this POS, pair the terminal, then test the direct Cloud connection. This mode only exposes transaction status results.

data.name: settings.linkly.cloudBackend.description
data.value: Use the backend Linkly workflow for asynchronous Cloud processing. This mode supports display, receipt, sendkey, and signature authorization. Save after a successful test to make the next payment use Linkly Cloud backend without a Square token.

data.name: settings.linkly.cloud.secretStatus.cached
data.value: Paired secret is saved securely on this POS.

data.name: settings.linkly.cloud.secretStatus.missing
data.value: No paired secret saved for this POS.

data.name: settings.linkly.cloud.credentialStatus.cached
data.value: Cloud API password is saved securely on this POS.

data.name: settings.linkly.cloud.credentialStatus.missing
data.value: No Cloud API password saved on this POS.

data.name: settings.linkly.cloud.terminalPairingSubtitle
data.value: Enter Linkly Cloud details for this POS.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.localCredentialMissing
data.value: Save the Linkly Cloud API username and password first.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.deviceContextMissing
data.value: Device registration context is unavailable. Reopen settings and try again.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.usernameRequired
data.value: Enter the Linkly Cloud API username first.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.passwordRequired
data.value: Enter the Linkly Cloud API password, or save it on this POS first.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.pairCodeRequired
data.value: Enter the Linkly VPP pair code first.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.note
data.value: Menu names may vary slightly on ANZ Worldline / Ingenico Move 5000 terminals.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.title
data.value: Switch to Linkly Cloud and generate a pairing code

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step1
data.value: On the terminal: Func -> 7410 -> Terminal Setup -> Begin -> Cloud Comms.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step2
data.value: For Wi-Fi: choose Setup Wi-Fi, select the store Wi-Fi, enter the password, then tap Next.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step3
data.value: For Ethernet: plug in the network cable, skip Wi-Fi setup, and wait for the terminal network test.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step4
data.value: When Cloud setup completed appears, press OK.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step5
data.value: Press Cancel to return to the main screen.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step6
data.value: When the terminal prompts for a Pairing Code, press Enter.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step7
data.value: Enter the 6-digit Pairing Code here and click Pair Cloud before it expires.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.cloud.step8
data.value: Cloud API username and password are saved locally on this POS and used for pairing.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.repair.step1
data.value: On the terminal: Func -> 8880 -> OK / Enter.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.repair.step2
data.value: After the terminal clears the old pairing, press Enter to generate a new 6-digit Pairing Code.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.repair.step3
data.value: Enter the new Pairing Code here and pair Cloud again.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.repair.warning
data.value: Warning: Func 8880 removes the existing pairing. Do not use it during trading unless you intend to re-pair.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.local.title
data.value: Switch back to local Linkly / Windows USB mode

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.local.step7
data.value: Save the settings and press Cancel to return to the main screen.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.local.step8
data.value: On the Windows PC, confirm Linkly software is installed and configured with the IP Gateway User ID and Password.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.local.step9
data.value: In POS settings, clear Use Linkly Cloud.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.local.step10
data.value: Host is usually 127.0.0.1 and Port is usually 2011.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.local.step11
data.value: Click Test Linkly. After the test succeeds, click Enable Linkly.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.mode.title
data.value: How to identify the current mode

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.mode.localIp
data.value: Local IP / Port: use when the Windows Linkly EFT-Client is running locally or on the LAN and the POS connects to its IP gateway.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.mode.cloudDirectSync
data.value: Cloud direct sync: use when the terminal is paired to Linkly Cloud, but the POS only needs transaction status results.

data.name: settings.linkly.sop.mode.cloudBackendAsync
data.value: Cloud backend async: use when the terminal is paired to Linkly Cloud and the POS needs display, receipt, sendkey, or signature authorization support.

data.name: settings.receiptPrinter.description
data.value: Configure the thermal receipt printer and the store information printed on receipts.

data.name: settings.deviceRegistration.description
data.value: Choose another store and submit an authorized reregistration request for this checkout device. Pending, failed, or syncing orders must be cleared first.

data.name: settings.status.noSquareDevices
data.value: No Square devices returned for this location.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceSwitchPendingSave
data.value: Selected {0}. Save Square to switch the next payment to this terminal.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodeNameRequired
data.value: Enter a device code name first.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodeCreated
data.value: Created device code {0} for {1}. Enter it on the Square Terminal, then refresh status.

data.name: settings.status.selectSquareDeviceCode
data.value: Select a Square device code first.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodeNotPaired
data.value: Device code is not paired yet. Current status: {0}.

data.name: settings.status.squareDeviceCodePaired
data.value: Device code paired successfully. {0} is selected and ready to save for the next payment.

data.name: settings.status.loadSquareBeforeSave
data.value: Load Square locations and devices before saving.

data.name: settings.status.squareSaved
data.value: Square terminal settings saved. The next payment will use {0}.

data.name: settings.linklyCloud.pairAuthFailed
data.value: Linkly Cloud pairing failed. Check the Sandbox VPP pair code and Cloud test account username/password.

data.name: settings.status.linklyCloudCredentialSaved
data.value: Linkly Cloud API test account saved securely.

data.name: settings.status.linklyCloudCredentialSynced
data.value: Linkly Cloud API test account saved securely and synced to HBPOS.

data.name: settings.status.testLinklyBeforeSave
data.value: Test Linkly connection before enabling ANZ Linkly.

data.name: settings.status.receiptPrinterNotConfigured
data.value: Receipt printer service is not configured.

data.name: settings.status.catalogDownloadNotConfigured
data.value: Catalog download service is not configured.

data.name: settings.status.catalogResetNotConfigured
data.value: Catalog reset service is not configured.

data.name: settings.status.testSalesDataResetNotConfigured
data.value: Test sales data reset service is not configured.

data.name: settings.status.reregisterNotConfigured
data.value: Device reregistration service is not configured.
